meaning: v.shy 的过去式或过去分词 (指马)惊退
examples: Hugh never shied away from his responsibilities.
My horse shied at the unfamiliar noise.
The newspapers have shied away from investigating the story.
In his seven years as the head man, Liddy has never shied away from difficult decisions.
And he has hardly shied from criticizing Huffington and AOL in public.
